outline.title: Digzio Platform Architecture
outline.summary: Title slide introducing the presentation on Digzio's end-to-end architecture, from frontend to backend infrastructure.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: End-to-End Architecture Overview
outline.summary: High-level diagram and summary of the Digzio platform architecture, highlighting the separation of frontend, API gateway, microservices, and data layer.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Frontend: React & Express Proxy
outline.summary: Details on the React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS frontend. Explains the Node.js/Express reverse proxy routing /api/* to the AWS ALB to handle CORS and mixed-content issues.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Infrastructure: AWS Fargate & ALB
outline.summary: Overview of the AWS af-south-1 infrastructure. Covers ECS Fargate for serverless compute, Application Load Balancer for routing, and S3 for hot-patching routes.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Data Layer: PostgreSQL & PostGIS
outline.summary: Details on the Amazon RDS PostgreSQL 15 database. Highlights the use of the PostGIS extension for geospatial queries (e.g., finding properties near institutions).
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Backend: 8 Node.js Microservices
outline.summary: Overview of the 8 distinct Node.js/Express microservices (Auth, Property, Application, Lease, KYC, Institution, etc.) and their specific responsibilities.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Role-Based Workflows & Integration
outline.summary: Summary of how the architecture supports the three main user roles: Students, Providers, and Institutions, through independent microservices sharing a single database.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
